evidence.quote: The initial coordinate of WT-p53Tet was taken from the solution NMR structure (PDB ID: 2J0Z)25 and the R337H mutant was generated by replacing Arg (R) at position 337 with His (H) using Pymol.67 The N- and C-termini of each protein were respectively capped by acetyl (CH3CO) and amino (NH2) groups

Five independent all-atom explicit-solvent MD simulations were performed... using the GROMACS-2018.3 software package68 in combination with Charmm36m69 force field. Each MD simulation was run for 2 μs... TIP3P water... 0.15 M was added... integration time step of 2 fs... cutoff distance of 1.4 nm... temperature was maintained at 310 K... pressure was kept at 1 bar

H-bond was considered to be formed if the distance... <= 0.35 nm and the D-H...A angle is >= 150°. A salt bridge was taken as formed if the minimum distance... is smaller than 0.4 nm... The last 500 ns simulation trajectories were used for analysis... RMSD value of R337H–p53Tet is larger (~0.34 nm) than that of WT-p53Tet (~0.26 nm)... peaks around 115... R337H mutant have peaks at reduced values (100

step_scores.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: An atomic contact was defined if the distance between two carbon atoms of nonsequential residues lies within 0.54 nm or the distance between any other two atoms of nonsequential residues lies within 0.46 nm... three residue pairs show a reduced SC–SC contact number... R(H)337–M340... F338–R342... weakened interactions are observed for... R(H)337–D352

issues.reason: Text mentions 'our in-house codes' for contact analysis without a specific citation number in that context, though Ref 81 is for network analysis later.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Add a note that in-house codes are not explicitly cited with a reference number in the methods section for contact maps.

evidence.quote: The secondary structure of the proteins was calculated using the Define Secondary Structure of Protein (DSSP) package.77... residues 335–A355... and β-sheet (residues Y327–R333)... probability of an α-helix is decreased by 5.0%... residues 335RERFEM340 in the N-terminal region

step_scores.label: mostly_supported

evidence.quote: Conformations used for principal components analysis... binned into a histogram over the first two principal components (PCs). The histogram was converted into a free energy landscape constructed using the relation -RT ln P(PC1, PC2)... In the FEL of WT-p53Tet, there exists a single deep free-energy minimum A... In contrast, in the FEL of R337H–p53Tet, there are three deep free-energy minima

issues.reason: Text describes PCA/FEL method without a specific citation number for the code/method itself.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: No specific reference exists in text for PCA code, so empty list is accurate but scores 0 on D.

evidence.quote: Dynamical networks were obtained using codes developed by Fargle and Sethi.81 Each Cα atom was selected as a representative node... Edges were added... (>70%)... Girvan–Newman algorithm82... connectivities between community-2 and community-1/3 are broken
The graphical analyses and structural visualization were performed using the Pymol package.67... snapshots of the wild type and R337H mutation p53TD tetramer at t=2.0 μs
